name: Review User Activity Logs for Security Audit
description:
A university compliance officer has requested a quarterly security audit of the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, username: super-admin, password: admin). Review the User Activity Logs to determine the total number of logged activities, the count of 'CREATE' type activities, and the count of 'MODIFY' type activities. Save a report to ~/Documents/activity_audit.txt using the following format:

SEB Server Quarterly Activity Audit
====================================
Total logged activities: <NUMBER>
CREATE actions: <NUMBER>
MODIFY actions: <NUMBER>
Audit performed by: super-admin
